summary: Completed frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control iteration 11 - Customize/Directory page redesign with Skills/Connectors/Plugins tabs. All 27 requested features tested and verified. Key changes: 1) CustomizePage completely rewritten as Claude-style Directory with 3 tabs (Skills/Connectors/Plugins), search, filter dropdown, 2-column card grid, 2) PlusMenu links updated to navigate to /customize?tab=X, 3) SettingsPage reads ?tab= URL param, 4) Thread creation/switching tracks modelId, 5) Thread sidebar shows model name under title.
passed_tests: Customize/Directory page: Skills tab renders 15 skill cards in 2-column grid with /skill-name, provider (OpenClaw), download count, descriptions, and +/gear toggle button
Customize/Directory page: Connectors tab renders 18 connector cards with names, descriptions, + buttons, and 'Interactive' badge on Figma
Customize/Directory page: Plugins tab renders 10 plugin cards with provider (OpenClaw), download counts, and +/check toggle
Customize/Directory page: Search functionality filters cards in real-time across all tabs (tested 'research' -> 1 result)
Customize/Directory page: Filter by dropdown works per tab (7 categories: All, Research, Design, Development, Writing, Productivity, Creative)
Customize/Directory page: Tab switching between Skills/Connectors/Plugins clears search and resets filters
Customize/Directory page: URL parameter ?tab=connectors navigates directly to Connectors tab
Customize/Directory page: URL parameter ?tab=plugins navigates directly to Plugins tab
Customize/Directory page: Skill toggle adds/removes from enabledSkills (gear icon when installed, + when not, blue border)
Customize/Directory page: Connector toggle activates/deactivates connector (check when active, + when not, green border)
Customize/Directory page: Plugin toggle installs/uninstalls (check when installed, + when not, blue border)
PlusMenu: 'Plugins' link navigates to /customize?tab=plugins
PlusMenu: 'Manage skills' link navigates to /customize?tab=skills
PlusMenu: 'Manage connectors' link navigates to /customize?tab=connectors
Settings page: URL parameter ?tab=apps navigates directly to Connected Apps tab
Model Selector: Opens on click, shows 6 providers (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice)
Model Selector: Hover reveals models panel with capabilities/context/cost badges
Model Selector: Selecting a model closes dropdown and updates active model
Thread management: Creating new thread via chat creates sidebar entry under RECENTS
Thread management: Threads show model name indicator below title (e.g., 'gpt-5.4-mini')
Thread management: Switching threads restores messages and model
Thread management: Deleting thread (X button on hover) removes from sidebar
Chat: Sending a message shows user bubble (blue, right-aligned) and streaming AI response with typing indicator
Chat: Markdown rendering in messages (bold, code blocks, lists, headings)
Jobs page: Shows 2 running jobs with progress bars and cancel buttons, plus history section
Approvals page: Shows 4 approvals with pending/approved/rejected status, approve/reject buttons for pending items
Dashboard page: Shows stats for Active Jobs (2), Pending Approvals (2), Connectors (0/6), Gateway status
Navigation: All 9 sidebar links (Chat, Agent, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize) navigate correctly
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 27+ requested features tested and working. Key iteration 11 changes verified: 1) CustomizePage completely rewritten as Claude-style Directory with left sidebar (Skills/Connectors/Plugins tabs), main content area with search input, 'OpenClaw & Partners' badge, filter dropdown, and 2-column card grid. 2) DIRECTORY_SKILLS has 15 items with /skill-name format, provider, downloads, desc, icon, category. 3) DIRECTORY_CONNECTORS has 18 items including Figma with 'Interactive' badge. 4) DIRECTORY_PLUGINS has 10 items with provider and downloads. 5) URL params ?tab=skills/connectors/plugins work via useLocation. 6) PlusMenu links updated: 'Plugins' -> /customize?tab=plugins, 'Manage skills' -> /customize?tab=skills, 'Manage connectors' -> /customize?tab=connectors. 7) SettingsPage reads ?tab=apps URL param. 8) Thread creation tracks modelId, sidebar shows model name below thread title. 9) Thread deletion via X button on hover. 10) Model selector shows 6 providers with hover-based models panel showing capabilities, context, cost badges.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), toggleConnector/toggleSkill/togglePlugin (state updates), createThread/deleteThread/setActiveThread (state updates), all settings updates (state updates)
